description: Unique identifier used to merge downloaded climate and environmental features back to the original dataset.
Total rainfall accumulated over the 7 days before the death date.
Total rainfall accumulated over the 30 days before the death date.
Total rainfall accumulated over the 90 days before the death date.
Number of days in the 30 days before the death date with rainfall greater than 1 mm.
Highest single-day rainfall observed in the 30 days before the death date.
Mean 2-metre air temperature over the 7 days before the death date.
Mean 2-metre air temperature over the 30 days before the death date.
Mean 2-metre air temperature over the 90 days before the death date.
Highest daily 2-metre maximum air temperature observed in the 30 days before the death date.
Lowest daily 2-metre minimum air temperature observed in the 30 days before the death date.
Number of days in the 30 days before the death date where daily maximum temperature exceeded 35°C.
Mean daily temperature range over the 30 days before the death date, calculated as daily maximum minus daily minimum temperature.
Median Normalized Difference Vegetation Index over the 30 days before the death date.
Median Normalized Difference Vegetation Index over the 90 days before the death date.
Ground elevation at the record location.
Terrain slope at the record location.
